{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Lady of Death
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Meira]]'s appearance with her [[scythe]] makes her look like the [[Lady of Death]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
